experiments.name: openwebtext_32k_tokenizer
experiments.reason: The 16-worker pre-tokenization attempt reached the available CPU-memory limit before vocabulary construction completed.

experiments.name: tinystories_40m_token_low_resource_training
experiments.reason: The CPU stage was limited to deterministic smoke validation; it does not substitute for a formal language-model run.

experiments.name: tinystories_baseline_and_generation
experiments.reason: No usable GPU was available in the current stage.

experiments.name: learning_rate_batch_size_and_architecture_sweeps
experiments.reason: Executable CUDA configs are included, but formal loss curves require a GPU run.

experiments.name: openwebtext_language_model
experiments.reason: Requires both the deferred 32K tokenizer and a usable GPU.

experiments.name: stanford_leaderboard
experiments.reason: The OpenMOSS laboratory assignment explicitly replaces Stanford external submission requirements.
